deepRecoveryTasks.reason: All captured sources are on the enterprise my.clevelandclinic.org domain anchored to the Cleveland, Ohio main campus. Cleveland Clinic Florida (Weston) campus-specific elective/observership eligibility, application, fee, and coordinator details are not directly captured. The system-level elective page only references 'Train in Florida' at Weston without Florida-specific eligibility/duration/contact.

verdictSummary: Zero PUBLIC_SAFE_USCE claims and zero PUBLIC_SAFE_NO_PUBLIC_OPPORTUNITY claims survived reclassification — every USCE-flavored signal was correctly downgraded to HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED on grounds that the source is the Cleveland Clinic enterprise/Ohio main-campus domain without Florida-campus applicability proof, and every Tier 2/3 signal is correctly tagged FUTURE_LANE_ONLY. Ledger is internally consistent and safe to merge as a 'no public USCE published' outcome for Cleveland Clinic Florida. Tier 1 coverage flagged PASS_PARTIAL because Florida-campus-specific elective/observership pages were not directly captured (recovery task proposed).
